metric.purpose: Hero number on summary screens — fares, totals, distances. One per surface.

display.purpose: Page title. One per page, top-of-page.

body-large.purpose: Lead paragraph; primary copy on confirmation screens.

body.purpose: All running text, form values, list rows.

caption.purpose: Supporting copy, meta lines under cards.

label.purpose: Section labels, field labels, table headers, status pills, eyebrows. Always uppercase.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Activated by .hover-lift modifier together with -2px translate.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Toasts, modals, floating panel — the only lifted tier.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: The system's only easing curve. Use for every transition.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Form focus, nav hover, color/border state changes.

motion.name: duration-card
motion.purpose: Card transforms — slow enough to feel deliberate.

motion.name: fade-in
motion.purpose: Mount fades for screens and overlays.

motion.name: status-sheen
motion.purpose: Left-to-right gloss across status pills on hover. One-off, not looping.

motion.name: pulse-ring
motion.purpose: Live-state indicator. The one infinite animation, only for system-live cues.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The default dark CTA with an inset Console Green icon chip on the right.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; min-height: 52px; padding: 6px 6px 6px 16px; background: #131313; color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Satoshi', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 16px 30px rgb(19 19 19 / 0.12); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #98fe00; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #98fe00; color: #131313; border-radius: 2px; transition: background-color 0.35s ease; }

components.name: Green Button
components.description: The 'primary primary'. One per surface; outshouts the dark variant.
components.css: .ds-btn-green { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; min-height: 52px; padding: 6px 6px 6px 16px; background: #98fe00; color: #131313; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Satoshi', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-green:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 16px 30px rgb(152 254 0 / 0.16); } .ds-btn-green:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-green:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #131313; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-green-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #131313; color: #98fe00; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; min-height: 52px; padding: 6px 16px; background: transparent; color: #131313; border: 1px solid #d3d3d3; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Satoshi', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1), border-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1), background-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); background: #f3f3f3; border-color: #131313; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #131313; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Calm field, focus expressed as elevation rather than coloured ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: 'Roboto Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7d8082; } .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 16px; background: #ffffff; color: #131313; border: 1px solid #d3d3d3; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Satoshi', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.5; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.01em; transition: border-color 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7d8082; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #131313; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(19 19 19 / 0.06); transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Page Card
components.description: The default container. One step of tonal lift, one hairline, very soft shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; padding: 24px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgb(19 19 19 / 0.06); transition: transform 0.55s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-card-head { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-section-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Roboto Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7d8082; flex: 1; } .ds-section-label::before { content: '/'; } .ds-section-label::after { content: ''; flex: 1; height: 1px; background: #e5e5e5; } .ds-data-pair { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; } .ds-data-pair > span:first-child { font-family: 'Roboto Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7d8082; } .ds-data-pair > span:last-child { font-family: 'Satoshi', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #131313; text-align: right; }

components.name: Status Pill — Completed
components.description: One status hue per booking lifecycle state. Mono-typed, sheen on hover.
components.css: .ds-status-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; min-height: 28px; padding: 6px 10px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #d3d3d3; background: #ffffff; color: #131313; font-family: 'Roboto Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease; } .ds-status-pill:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-status-completed { background: rgb(152 254 0 / 0.2); color: #131313; border-color: rgb(152 254 0 / 0.45); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Top-bar link. Mono uppercase voice; lift on hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 44px; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: transparent; font-family: 'Satoshi', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.01em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7d8082; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease, background-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link-active { color: #131313; border-color: #d3d3d3; background: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-link:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #131313; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Stepper Dot — Complete
components.description: Booking-flow step indicator; the licensed home of Console Green as a leader.
components.css: .ds-step-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-step-dot { width: 36px; height: 36px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #d3d3d3; background: #ffffff; font-family: 'Roboto Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #7d8082; transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1), background-color 0.35s ease, color 0.35s ease, border-color 0.35s ease; } .ds-step-dot-complete { background: #98fe00; border-color: #98fe00; color: #131313; transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-step-label { font-family: 'Roboto Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #131313; }

narrative.overview: A near-monochrome console with a single charged accent. The system reads like a well-built dispatch tool worn into a consumer surface: light off-white background, near-black for everything that matters, lime-green when the system needs to shout. Mono labels precede content like channel markers, so a glance lands the eye on the right field before the body type is even read. Information density is high; ornament is low. The surface is pre-committed: light, calm, untextured. Decoration belongs to the data, not the chrome.
keyCharacteristics: Light surface (#f9f9f9) as the immutable canvas; near-black (#131313) does the heavy lifting.
One accent: lime green #98fe00. Used on ≤10% of any screen, never decoratively.
Sharp default radius: 4px. Larger radii (14px / 20px) are reserved for floating panels and modals only.
Mono labels (Roboto Mono, 11px, uppercase, letter-spaced) precede every section, field, and metric.
Dual-band sizing: cards and inputs at 28-52px heights; display type at 32-80px.
Motion is exclusively cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1) (ease-out-quint). State only, no choreography.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Console Green appears on no more than 10% of any given screen. It marks one thing per surface — the active CTA, the completed step, the live status — never two simultaneously.

rules.name: The No-Black-On-White Rule
rules.body: Pure #000 is forbidden. Every dark surface uses Concierge Black #131313, paired with off-white canvas #f9f9f9.

rules.name: The Status-Hue Lockbox Rule
rules.body: Each status hue maps to exactly one booking lifecycle state. They are not borrowed for other UI roles.

rules.name: The Mono Label Rule
rules.body: Every section heading, field label, table header, and data key is set in Roboto Mono 11px uppercase with 0.08em tracking. Satoshi is never used at small sizes uppercase; mono is never used at body sizes.

rules.name: The Slash Marker Rule
rules.body: Section labels render with a leading / glyph and a trailing flex-fill hairline. This is the system's signature; do not strip it.

rules.name: The Negative Tracking Rule
rules.body: All Satoshi sizes use slightly negative letter-spacing. Positive tracking on Satoshi is forbidden.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat. Shadow is a response to state — hover, focus, overlay — not a default treatment.

rules.name: The 4px Radius Rule
rules.body: The default radius is 4px. Use 14px and 20px only for floating overlays. Do not introduce a new radius value mid-system.

dos: Do read packages/frontend/src/styles/theme.css before writing any new component. Use the existing utility classes (.page-card, .ds-input, .btn-primary, .section-label, .data-pair, .status-pill) before introducing new ones.
Do use Console Green (#98fe00) for exactly one 'loudest thing' per screen — confirmed status, completed step, the single primary CTA when it needs to outshout black. Never two greens visible at once.
Do prefix every section, field, and table header with a Roboto Mono 11px uppercase label, letter-spaced 0.08em. Use .section-label so the leading / and trailing hairline come for free.
Do use Concierge Black #131313 for the dark anchor and Off-White Canvas #f9f9f9 for the light anchor — these are paired, not interchangeable with #000 / #fff.
Do keep the default radius at 4px. Reserve 14px / 20px for floating overlays.
Do use cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1) (ease-out-quint) for every transition.
Do keep mobile primary: design the booking flow at 360–414px first, adapt up.
Do lean into the existing motion library (fade-in, slide-up, scale-in, pulse-ring, status-sheen, icon-diagonal-shift).
donts: Don't introduce a parallel design system — new buttons, new cards, new pills with different paddings or radii. Extend theme.css; never compete with it.
Don't use Console Green for body text, large fills, decorative borders, or any role beyond signalling completion / activation.
Don't use pure #000 or pure #fff anywhere. Always Concierge Black #131313 and Surface White #ffffff.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a coloured side-stripe on cards, alerts, or list items.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient. There are no gradient texts in this system.
Don't build hero sections from a giant number, small label, and three supporting metrics in cards — the SaaS hero-metric template.
Don't repeat identical icon-and-text card grids.
Don't use modals as the first thought. Reach for .modal-panel only for confirms and edits that genuinely block.
Don't narrate steps with marketing copy. Mono labels carry the structure.
Don't use em dashes in UI copy.
